title: Joyful Eastern Cape adventure gives Abraham Kriel children a holiday to remember
description: EASTERN CAPE NEWS - The Abraham Kriel...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"EASTERN CAPE NEWS - The Abraham Kriel Children’s home in Nylstroom is an NPO rendering residential care services to 230 children who are in need of care and protection.","html":"EASTERN CAPE NEWS - The Abraham Kriel Children’s home in Nylstroom is an NPO rendering residential care services to 230 children who are in need of care and protection."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“Amy Bell Charities reached out to this children’s home, and they were invited to visit the Eastern Cape, where our organisation sponsored a few outings for these children,” says Irvin Tam, director of Amy Bell Charities in Cradock."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The journey","html":"The journey"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The bus with learners arrived in Cradock on 29 November after a long drive and were served sandwiches and cold cool drink at the Amy Bell Centre in Cradock, from where their next stop was at Paterson.","html":"The bus with learners arrived in Cradock on 29 November after a long drive and were served sandwiches and cold cool drink at the Amy Bell Centre in Cradock, from where their next stop was at Paterson."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Amy Bell Angels in Port Elizabeth, under the leadership of Irvin Tam, had arranged for accommodation for each young “tourist” from Nylstroom.","html":"The Amy Bell Angels in Port Elizabeth, under the leadership of Irvin Tam, had arranged for accommodation for each young “tourist” from Nylstroom."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Various outings","html":"Various outings"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On the third day the children went to Crossways Farm Village by bus for a day filled with excitement.","html":"On the third day the children went to Crossways Farm Village by bus for a day filled with excitement."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Too many choices, too little time!” said Tam.","html":"“Too many choices, too little time!” said Tam."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When in PE, a visit to the beach is a must, and the children had a lovely day on the beach in Summerstrand, ending the day with games and competitions on the beach.","html":"When in PE, a visit to the beach is a must, and the children had a lovely day on the beach in Summerstrand, ending the day with games and competitions on the beach."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The children also had a training session in first aid, presented by Hugo and Tiaan Barendse, who travelled all the way from Cradock to PE to present the training.","html":"The children also had a training session in first aid, presented by Hugo and Tiaan Barendse, who travelled all the way from Cradock to PE to present the training."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The children could play with the paramedic dolls and learn to do CPR - and were allowed to play on the NMU sports grounds.","html":"The children could play with the paramedic dolls and learn to do CPR - and were allowed to play on the NMU sports grounds."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The group left the following day for Cape Vidal Nature Reserve but, finding they were too early and it was still closed, enjoyed a different kind of sightseeing: a beautiful sunrise and dolphins playing in the surf.","html":"The group left the following day for Cape Vidal Nature Reserve but, finding they were too early and it was still closed, enjoyed a different kind of sightseeing: a beautiful sunrise and dolphins playing in the surf."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After breakfast, they visited Gravity Baywest Entertainment Park, where the children had to leave their shoes in a trolley before using the entertainment offered. “Imagine having to sort out 75 pairs of shoes after the visit!” said Tam.","html":"After breakfast, they visited Gravity Baywest Entertainment Park, where the children had to leave their shoes in a trolley before using the entertainment offered. “Imagine having to sort out 75 pairs of shoes after the visit!” said Tam."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A karaoke night, organised by Amy’s Angels, had the children enthusiastically singing along and having a good time.","html":"A karaoke night, organised by Amy’s Angels, had the children enthusiastically singing along and having a good time."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Nine fun days","html":"Nine fun days"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The group returned o Nylstroom after nine fun-filled days in the Eastern Cape.","html":"The group returned o Nylstroom after nine fun-filled days in the Eastern Cape."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Abraham Kriel Children’s Home extended their appreciation to the Amy Bell Charities for making this adventure holiday possible.","html":"The Abraham Kriel Children’s Home extended their appreciation to the Amy Bell Charities for making this adventure holiday possible."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Joyful Eastern Cape adventure gives Abraham Kriel children a holiday to remember
